article.title: Paramount Refused to Air an Ad Criticizing Its Merger With Warner Bros.
article.summary: The commercial was submitted by the Freedom of the Press Foundation to run during Donald Trump’s UFC event. It criticized the $111 billion merger as a threat to the First Amendment.
article.title_zh: Paramount 拒絕播放批評其與 Warner Bros 合併的廣告
article.summary_zh: 該廣告由新聞自由基金會提交，計劃在川普 UFC 賽事期間播放，批評這筆 1,110 億美元的合併威脅第一修正案。

article.title: Principal Mineral Buys Cerberus-Backed Critical Materials Firm
article.summary: Principal Mineral is buying a Cerberus Capital Management LP-backed firm that produces components for printed circuit boards, a key electronic part used in products from cars to planes to AI servers.
article.title_zh: Principal Mineral 收購 Cerberus 支持的關鍵材料公司
article.summary_zh: Principal Mineral 收購 Cerberus Capital Management 支持的公司，該公司生產印刷電路板組件，用於汽車、飛機和 AI 伺服器等產品。

article.title: Man Group Sees ‘Bubble Risks’ as AI Bond Sales Break Records
article.summary: Man Group Plc says “bubble risks” are mounting as bond sales boom in the race to build out artificial intelligence infrastructure.
article.title_zh: Man Group 警告 AI 債券發行創紀錄時出現「泡沫風險」
article.summary_zh: Man Group 表示在人工智慧基礎設施建設競賽中債券發行創紀錄時，「泡沫風險」正在上升。

article.title: Apple supplier Tata avoids regulatory action after pollution warning in India
article.summary: Apple supplier Tata says an Indian pollution regulator has dropped scrutiny of one of its iPhone component plants, after the company responded to concerns over possible wastewater contamination. Here are the details.
article.title_zh: Apple 供應商 Tata 在污染警告後避免印度監管行動
article.summary_zh: Apple 供應商 Tata 表示，印度污染監管機構已停止對其一家 iPhone 零件廠的審查，該公司已回應關於潛在廢水污染的疑慮。

article.title: SMI says Nvidia is driving its consumer PCIe 6.0 roadmap, not AMD and Intel — RTX Spark agentic AI platform fuels a hunger for storage bandwidth
article.summary: Nvidia may be ahead of AMD and Intel with PCIe Gen6-supporting platform for client PCs due to its client agentic AI ambitions, and that roadmap has suppliers like Silicon Motion paying attention.
article.title_zh: SMI 表示 Nvidia 主導其消費端 PCIe 6.0 路線圖，而非 AMD 和 Intel——RTX Spark 代理型 AI 平台推動對儲存頻寬的渴望
article.summary_zh: 由於客戶端代理型 AI 野心，Nvidia 在支持 PCIe Gen6 的客戶端平台上可能領先 AMD 和 Intel，該路線圖已引起 Silicon Motion 等供應商的關注。

article.title: Announcing Web Search on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore: Ground your AI agents in current, accurate web knowledge
article.summary: Today, we’re announcing the general availability of Web Search on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore , a fully managed tool that enables agents to ground responses in current, cited web knowledge with zero data egress from customer’s secured AWS environment. Web Search uses a built-in connector target on Bedrock AgentCore Gateway using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Your agent sends a natural-language query, and Web Search returns most relevant snippets, source URLs, titles, and publication dates that the model can reason over to produce a grounded response. It is built on Amazon’s search infrastructure, informed by years of experience powering agentic search experiences across Alexa+ , Amazon Quick , and Kiro . It uses a multi-source grounding approach that combines Amazon’s web index with struc
article.title_zh: 宣佈Amazon Bedrock AgentCore上的Web Search：使用當前、準確的網路知識支持您的AI agents
article.summary_zh: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore上的Web Search正式推出，是一個完全托管的工具，使agents能夠基於當前的、有引用的網路知識進行回應，同時零數據外流。

article.title: Verizon Simplicity is a new unlimited 5G plan that aims to clean up your phone bill
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Verizon is introducing the new Simplicity plan: a single flat-rate unlimited plan that grants all subscribers full access to its 5G Ultra Wideband network. Home Internet access can be added for $35 a month. There’s also the new Verizon One plan, which combines mobile and home internet into a single bill for $70 a month, with all taxes and fees included. The new Verizon Loyalty program removes standard $40 activation and upgrade fees, offers 3% monthly cash back in Verizon Dollars, and introduces a “Verizon Shine” gamified rewards tier. Verizon is fundamentally altering its consumer strategy with a massive, multi-year transformation that ditches its famously complex mobile plan tiers in favor of a flat-rate unlimited plan alongside a unified
article.title_zh: Verizon Simplicity 是新推出的無限制 5G 方案，旨在簡化您的電話帳單
article.summary_zh: Verizon 推出新的 Simplicity 方案，提供單一統一費率的無限方案，讓所有用戶可完整使用 5G Ultra Wideband 網絡，家用網際網路每月可加購 $35。

article.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
article.summary: Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that brings Google’s latest AI models to its devices.
article.title_zh: Android 17 推出新多工處理工具，Google 擴展 Gemini 功能
article.summary_zh: Google 發佈 Android 17 和 Wear OS 7，引入新的多工處理功能、家長控制、安全工具和智慧手錶升級。此次發佈並附帶 Pixel Drop，將 Google 最新的 AI 模型帶到其設備上。

article.title: Google expands Parental Controls and Family Link features with Android 17
article.summary: Google introduced its new Android Parental Controls set of features alongside the Pixel 10 series last year, but they will be reaching more Android phones with Android 17. The new controls will give parents more control over their kids' phones and their digital wellbeing. Parental Controls are built into Android's Settings menu and offer a convenient way to track your kids' screen time, create a downtime schedule, apply Google Play app filters and limit the time spent on specific apps. Blocking apps altogether is also an option. For instance, parents can set up an automatic...
article.title_zh: Google 用 Android 17 擴展家長控制和家庭連結功能
article.summary_zh: Google 推出的 Android 家長控制功能將隨 Android 17 推廣至更多 Android 手機，讓父母更好地管理孩子的手機和數位健康。

article.title: “Agents need boring infrastructure around them”: Why we need to take an interest in ‘invisible’ AI
article.summary: AI is already inside most enterprises’ IT stacks, but it’s had a somewhat shambolic and unsystematic early adolescence. Employees use personal tools, teams adopt different models, different company departments get forced into corners by vendors who push closed stacks, and agents are beginning to act inside systems that were built for people.  That makes AI invisible, fragmented, and hard to change later.  AI access and control platform company Tailscale announced on Tuesday the results of its work to address and redress these imbalances with new capabilities for Aperture , the company’s flagship toolset designed to provide a stable layer for managing AI across changing models , tools, data sources, and agents. Designed to enable software developers to control an
article.title_zh: 「Agents需要圍繞它們的無聊基礎設施」：為什麼我們需要關注「隱形」AI
article.summary_zh: AI已存在於大多數企業的IT堆棧中，但早期發展還不夠系統。員工使用個人工具，團隊採用不同模型，agents的基礎設施建設面臨挑戰。

article.title: 8 new features coming to your Pixel phone with the June Pixel Drop
article.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR Google has announced the June 2026 Pixel Drop. This Pixel Drop brings AirDrop support to more budget Pixels, Custom Greetings in Take A Message, and new Gemini models. Google is also bringing several pre-existing Pixel features to new markets. Google’s quarterly Pixel Drops are always cause for celebration, as the company brings new features and improvements to its Pixel devices . We’ve been eagerly waiting for the June Pixel Drop, and the day has finally come. There’s no shortage of additions in this Pixel Drop, but what are the most notable features this time? We’ve picked seven improvements and features worth knowing.
article.title_zh: 6月Pixel Drop為您的Pixel手機帶來8項新功能
article.summary_zh: Google宣佈2026年6月Pixel Drop，為更多預算型Pixel帶來AirDrop支援和新Gemini模型。

article.title: SpaceX to acquire AI coding platform Cursor for $60 billion
article.summary: SpaceX will acquire AI coding tool Cursor for $60 billion in an all-stock transaction, the companies announced today. The deal is expected to close in the third quarter. It comes just two days after SpaceX's unprecedented IPO and a few months after the merger of SpaceX and xAI, which brought a significant restructuring of xAI. Cursor was one of the first tools to fully bake features that leverage large language models into an IDE. It's a branch of Visual Studio Code with heavy AI integration. However, incumbent platforms and bigger AI companies have since rolled out comparable features. Read full article Comments
article.title_zh: SpaceX 以 60 億美元收購 AI 編碼平台 Cursor
article.summary_zh: SpaceX 將以全股票交易方式以 60 億美元收購 AI 編碼工具 Cursor，該交易預計在第三季度完成。這是在 SpaceX 創紀錄的 IPO 後僅兩天宣布的。

article.title: Google Phone app on Wear OS gets Material 3 Expressive redesign
article.summary: Besides updates to the Contacts app , Phone by Google has received a sizable Material 3 Expressive redesign on Wear OS.
article.title_zh: Google Phone app 在 Wear OS 上推出 Material 3 Expressive 重新設計
article.summary_zh: Google Phone 應用在 Wear OS 上進行了大規模 Material 3 Expressive 重新設計。Contacts app 也獲得更新。

article.title: Meta's Threads celebrates 500 million users with a bunch of new features
article.summary: There was a time when many Twitter alternatives popped up, and Meta couldn't resist throwing its hat in this game too, with Threads. Threads may have started as a way to capture people leaving Twitter after Elon Musk bought it, but it's now all grown up, it seems. The service has reached 500 million monthly active users, having added about 100 million since last August. Undoubtedly, its ties with Instagram have made it easier to jump to than other Twitter wannabes. But Meta says the recently launched communities feature has been driving a lot of the growth. To celebrate the...
article.title_zh: Meta 的 Threads 迎來 5 億使用者，推出一系列新功能
article.summary_zh: Meta 推出的 Threads 已達成 5 億使用者里程碑，並推出一系列新功能。該服務從 Twitter 替代品發展成為成熟的社交平台。
